title: Anvil MusBox
description: Adds Anvil Note Blocks - note blocks that produce anvil sounds when placed on anvils. Supports Jade for instrument display.
body:
# Anvil MusBox

Anvil MusBox adds a new decorative and functional block to Minecraft: the **Anvil Note Block**!

## Features

- **Anvil Note Block**: A special variant of the note block that produces anvil sounds instead of traditional instrument sounds when placed on anvils
- **Jade Support**: When Jade is installed, the instrument display will show "Anvil" instead of the default note block instrument
- **Axe Mineable**: Can be mined faster with an axe, just like other note blocks
- **Vanilla Compatible**: Works seamlessly with vanilla Minecraft mechanics

## How to Play

1. Craft the Anvil Note Block using the standard note block recipe
2. Place it on an anvil
3. Hit the block to play the iconic anvil sound!
4. Use it in your redstone contraptions or musical creations

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge (required)
- Jade (optional, for enhanced instrument display)

## Technical Details

This mod modifies the note block behavior to detect when placed on anvils and changes the sound accordingly. The Jade integration is completely optional and the mod functions perfectly without it.

## Custom Translation

For custom block translation, use the translation key `block.anvil_musbox.anvil_note_box`. If this key is not defined, it will fallback to the vanilla `block.minecraft.note_block`.

## Porting

If you need ports to other Minecraft versions or mod loaders, please open an issue on GitHub. You can also port it yourself according to the MIT License.
